**Top X posts matching your query "(Cursor AI OR Cursor IDE OR AI IDE OR AI code editor OR AI programming) lang:en" in Top mode:**

1. **Lex Fridman (@lexfridman)** on Jan 31, 2026 (5.2K likes, 827K views):[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2017735625227833850)
   - Discusses a podcast on AI in 2026, highlighting Cursor alongside Claude Code as key programming & dev tools. Covers topics like best AI for coding (timestamp 21:38), scaling laws, AGI timelines, and more. Includes a ~4-hour video with guests Sebastian Raschka and Nathan Lambert.

2. **Flo writes Code (@FloWritesCode)** on Feb 4, 2026:[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018992745218765204)
   - Humorous take: "Xcode Agents, Cursor, Codex, Antigravity, Claude Code. Turns out programming gets replaced with juggling in the AI era."

These are the top results. Cursor is frequently praised as a leading AI code editor (VS Code fork with built-in AI like Claude/GPT for autocompletion, editing, and debugging).
